name: Daily Admin
description: Personal daily planner — manage your schedule, to-dos, and notes with carry-forward and automated rollups.
author: Clubhouse Workshop

topics.title: Overview
topics.content:
## Daily Admin

A personal daily planner that manages your schedule, to-dos, and notes. Incomplete items carry forward automatically, and weekly/monthly rollups surface trends and patterns.

topics.title: Key Features
topics.content:
## Key Features

**Schedule** — Time-blocked daily schedule with current block highlighting.

**To-Dos** — Task list with states (to-do, done, carried-fwd, cancelled), due dates, and linked items.

**Carry Forward** — Incomplete items automatically carry forward to the next day.

**Things to Remember** — Agent-surfaced reminders about overdue items and patterns, each dismissible.

topics.title: Commands
topics.content:
## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| **Add To-Do** | Add a new to-do item to today's note |
| **Add Schedule Block** | Add a time block to today's schedule |
| **Refresh Daily Admin** | Reload data from storage |

topics.title: Permissions
topics.content:
## Permissions

| Permission | Why it's needed |
|------------|----------------|
| **logging** | Log diagnostic information |
| **storage** | Persist daily notes, schedule, and to-dos |
| **notifications** | Show reminders and alerts |
| **commands** | Register command palette entries |
| **widgets** | Display UI components |
| **theme** | Adapt colors to the current theme |
